languages.text: "Следуем букве Лекс Империалис. К казни приговариваются оба участника дела".
languages.translation_comment:

Казним обоих, весы уравниваются

languages.text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."
languages.original_text: "Следуем букве Лекс Империалис. К казни приговариваются оба участника дела".

traits.locale_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."
"We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."
"We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."
"We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."
"We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."
"We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

languages.text: "Wir werden den Buchstaben des Lex Imperia folgen. Beide Parteien werden hiermit zum Tode verurteilt."
languages.original_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden den Buchstaben des Lex Imperia folgen. Beide Parteien werden hiermit zum Tode verurteilt."

languages.text: « Nous allons suivre la Lex Imperialis à la lettre. Les deux parties sont condamnées à la peine capitale. »
languages.original_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

traits.locale_text: « Nous allons suivre la Lex Imperialis à la lettre. Les deux parties sont condamnées à la peine capitale. »

languages.text: “我们应当遵循《帝国法典》的相关规定，双方当事人都应当判处死刑。”
languages.original_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

traits.locale_text: “我们应当遵循《帝国法典》的相关规定，双方当事人都应当判处死刑。”

languages.text: «Seguiremos la Lex Imperialis al pie de la letra. Por la presente, ambas partes del caso quedan condenadas a muerte».
languages.original_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

traits.locale_text: «Seguiremos la Lex Imperialis al pie de la letra. Por la presente, ambas partes del caso quedan condenadas a muerte».

languages.text: 「レックス・インペリアの条文に従う。本件の両当事者をここに死刑に処す」
languages.original_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

traits.locale_text: 「レックス・インペリアの条文に従う。本件の両当事者をここに死刑に処す」

languages.text: "Lex İmperialis'in kelâmına uyacağız. Davanın iki tarafı da ölüme mahkûm edilmiştir."
languages.original_text: "We shall follow the letter of the Lex Imperialis. Both parties to the case are hereby sentenced to death."

traits.locale_text: "Lex İmperialis'in kelâmına uyacağız. Davanın iki tarafı da ölüme mahkûm edilmiştir."
